title: iHymns Song Database
description: Schema for the iHymns songs.json canonical song database. Generated by tools/parse-songs.js from .SourceSongData/ text files.

meta.description: Generation metadata for this build of the song database.

generatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this file was generated.

generatorVersion.description: Semantic version of the parse-songs.js generator.

totalSongs.description: Total number of songs across all songbooks.

songs.description: Array of all song objects across all songbooks.

name.description: Full display name of the songbook.

songCount.description: Number of songs in this songbook.

song.description: A single hymn or worship song with lyrics and metadata.

id.description: Unique song identifier in the format BOOK-NNNN (e.g. 'CP-0001').

title.description: Song title as it appears in the songbook.

songbook.description: Songbook abbreviation this song belongs to.

songbookName.description: Full display name of the songbook (denormalised for convenience).

language.description: IETF BCP 47 language tag for the song lyrics (e.g. 'en', 'en-GB', 'fr-FR'). Identifies language, regional locale, and optionally script.

writers.description: Lyricists / authors. Empty array if unknown.

composers.description: Music composers / arrangers. Empty array if unknown.

copyright.description: Copyright notice text. Empty string if public domain or unknown.

ccli.description: CCLI (Christian Copyright Licensing International) song number. Empty string if not assigned.

verified.description: Whether the lyrics have been manually verified as complete and accurate.

lyricsPublicDomain.description: Whether the song lyrics are in the public domain (no copyright restrictions on words).

musicPublicDomain.description: Whether the song music/melody is in the public domain (no copyright restrictions on tune).

hasAudio.description: Whether a companion MIDI audio file exists for this song.

hasSheetMusic.description: Whether a companion PDF sheet music file exists for this song.

components.description: Ordered array of song components (verses, choruses, refrains, etc.).

arrangement.description: Optional playback order as indices into the components array. When present, the renderer uses this order instead of sequential. Auto-generated for songs with a chorus or refrain.

component.description: A structural part of a song (verse, chorus, refrain, bridge, etc.).

number.description: Component number within its type (e.g. verse 1, verse 2). 1-based. Null for unnumbered components like a single chorus or refrain.

lines.description: Array of text lines that make up this component.
